name: Mga Batang Poz
overview: Four teenagers, all HIV positive and members of Love is Brave—a support group for people living with HIV—decide to meet in a cafe. This includes Luis, the school heartthrob and son of a Chinese businessman; Enzo, who has body and family issues; Gab, the dutiful son of a town mayor; and Chuchay, an urban poor teen who works to support his family.

trailers.title: 'Mga Batang Poz' Trailer | iWant Original Series
